name: files.delete
description: Delete a file from the filesystem. Respects write_scope settings for PR-based deletions. Does not delete directories (use files.deleteDir for that).

path.description: Absolute or workspace-relative path to the file to delete (required)

write_scope.description: Write target scope (default: inherit from project settings)

commit_message.description: Commit message for PR deletions (optional, auto-generated if not provided)

path.description: Normalized absolute path of deleted file

existed.description: Whether the file existed before deletion

pr_url.description: PR URL if deletion included PR target

commit_sha.description: Git commit SHA if deletion included PR target

error.description: Error message if success is false
